theme_and_archetype.rationale: Apple-style SaaS minimalism combined with a high-end Web3/security vibe. We use a deep void black base to represent high-end hardware, with controlled electric blue and deep purple restricted strictly to glows and accents to signify security and technology. No flat bright backgrounds.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight leading-tight
hierarchy.overline: text-xs sm:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-neutral-500

rules: Never center default headings unless it improves visual balance in hero/cta.
Use 'tracking-tighter' for all headers over 32px to create a premium tech feel.
Headings should primarily be white (#FFFFFF). Use text gradients sparingly on key words only.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, py-24, py-32 for sections.

bento_grid.implementation: Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 or gap-8. Mix col-span-4, col-span-8, row-span-2 to create tension. No perfectly uniform squares.
bento_grid.rules: Direct children only in grid. If using framer-motion, the motion.div must be the direct child.

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, and dense content. Center only the main Hero text and Final CTA.

crystal_glass.usage: Sticky Headers, Floating Navs, Modal Overlays

tracing_beam_cards.classes: bg-[#0F0F0F] border border-white/5 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-white/20 transition-colors duration-500
tracing_beam_cards.glow_effect: Add a radial gradient via before/after pseudo-elements that tracks mouse position, or simply a subtle blue inset shadow on hover.

grid_borders.classes: border-collapse border border-white/10. Items inside have border-r border-b border-white/10.

micro_interactions: Hover on buttons: scale 1.05, increase shadow to 0 0 20px rgba(0,122,255,0.4).
Hover on glass cards: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border brightens to white/20.
animations.page_load: Staggered fade-in up (y: 20 -> 0) for Hero elements.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 transition-all font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-full
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 backdrop-blur-md transition-all px-6 py-3 rounded-full
buttons.accent: bg-[#007AFF] text-white hover:bg-[#005bb5] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,122,255,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,122,255,0.5)] px-6 py-3 rounded-full transition-all

icons.style: Use thin stroke widths (1.5) for Apple-like elegance.

components.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g. data-testid="hero-cta-button").

hero_background.description: Abstract blue/purple streaks on dark. Use as an absolute background with opacity-30 and a black radial gradient overlay so text remains readable.

gis_mapping_feature.description: Aerial city night map for GIS mapping feature card. Use with grayscale and blue tint.

abstract_blue_lines.description: Use for the 'AI Fraud Detection' background texture or impact section background.

team_members.description: Man with arms crossed. Team profile.
Man with beard and glasses. Team profile.
Young man in black attire. Team profile.

logos.description: Minimalist white abstract icon. Use as placeholder for partners/backers.

section_guidelines.Hero: Must contain the glowing abstract background image heavily dimmed. Huge heading (Cabinet Grotesk) with tracking-tighter. Use text-glow effect on 'Digital Land Forgery'. CTA must be rounded-full Apple style. Nav must be sticky Crystal Glass.
section_guidelines.Problem: Display stats in a dense 'Control Room' bento grid. Number should be text-5xl, label text-sm uppercase (overline).
section_guidelines.Features: Bento Grid cards. One dominant card (col-span-full md:col-span-8) for Blockchain Security, smaller ones for Biometric Auth, AI Fraud Detection. Use Tracing Beam card style (subtle border/glow on hover).
section_guidelines.How It Works: Vertical timeline. Use a thin electric blue line (#007AFF) connecting steps. Staggered reveal using framer-motion.
section_guidelines.Impact: Minimalist section. Use generous whitespace. Focus on emotional storytelling with a serif or high-contrast sans-serif statement.
section_guidelines.Business Model & SWOT: Use Grid Borders (Technical Look). Expose the skeleton, border-collapse. Keep text strictly white/gray.
section_guidelines.Target Users: Use clean, borderless list items with subtle hover translate-x-2 effects.
section_guidelines.Team: Use fetched portrait images in a strict grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4. Grayscale images that turn color on hover.
section_guidelines.Final CTA: High-energy section. Gradient Text for the headline. Massive spacing (py-32).
section_guidelines.Footer: Massive py-32 space. Huge logo at the bottom right. Contrast shift not needed as the whole site is dark, but use a subtle border-t border-white/10.
